message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage King Crimson: Ultimate Build & Combo Guide 2026",
  description: "Master King Crimson in Bizarre Lineage with our in-depth guide for 2026. Discover optimal builds, devastating combos, and essential strategies to dominate PvP and PvE with this S-tier Stand.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B0000/fff?text=King+Crimson+Guide",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **King Crimson** is an **S-Tier** Stand, primarily obtained via **Stand Arrow**.
- Optimal builds pair it with **Boxing** and **Vampire** for incredible combo potential.
- Key abilities like **Time Erase**, **Impale**, and the **Epitaph counter** offer unique combat advantages.
- Master its unique **hyper armor** and combo extenders for unparalleled PvP dominance.
- Avoid common mistakes such as neglecting fighting styles or ignoring crucial matchup knowledge.
</Callout>

In the dynamic world of Bizarre Lineage, choosing the right Stand can make all the difference between victory and defeat. Among the most coveted and powerful Stands is **King Crimson**, a formidable entity renowned for its time manipulation and ruthless combat prowess. Players seeking to ascend the ranks and dominate both PvP and PvE encounters often turn to this S-tier Stand for its unique blend of offensive capabilities and defensive utility. This comprehensive guide for 2026 will delve deep into everything you need to know about King Crimson, from its acquisition and core abilities to the most effective builds and devastating combo strategies. Prepare to unravel the secrets of **King Crimson** and transform your gameplay into an unstoppable force.

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Unveiling King Crimson: Rarity & Acquisition">
King Crimson stands as a highly sought-after Stand in Bizarre Lineage, recognized for its immense power and versatility. Its S-Tier ranking reflects its capability to dominate in various combat scenarios, particularly in 1v1 engagements. Acquiring this Stand typically involves a degree of luck and persistence, as it's one of the rarer drops in the game. Understanding its acquisition method and inherent traits is the first step toward mastering its power.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="King Crimson Overview">
    - **Overall Tier**: S-Tier
    - **Primary Role**: Pure Assassin, 1v1 Specialist
    - **Awakening Requirement**: **110 skill points**
  </Card>
  <Card title="Acquisition Method">
    - **Primary Item**: **Stand Arrow**
    - **Rarity**: One of the rarest Stands
    - **Strategy**: Stock up on arrows; multiple attempts are common.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="tip" title="Pro Tip: Maximize Your Chances">
To increase your odds of obtaining King Crimson, focus on farming **Stand Arrows** efficiently. Participating in world events and completing story quests are reliable ways to accumulate arrows, giving you more chances to roll for this powerful Stand.
</Callout>

King Crimson also comes with several inherent traits that bolster its combat effectiveness. These traits often include bonuses to block breaking against low-health enemies, increased hit start, and enhanced damage for certain moves. Maximizing these traits through proper skill point allocation is crucial for unlocking King Crimson's full potential.

| Trait Name               | Effect                                       | Optimal Use                               |
| :----------------------- | :------------------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------- |
| **Two Steps Ahead**      | Dodging grants next attack 15% damage bonus  | Aggressive play, combo initiation         |
| **Block Breaker**        | Enemies below 50% HP have block broken       | Finishers, sustained pressure             |
| **Belages Deal More DMG** | Barrage attacks deal **20% more damage**   | Close-range engagements, combo extensions |

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="King Crimson's Arsenal: Moves & Abilities">
King Crimson's unique abilities revolve around precise strikes, time manipulation, and devastating counters, making it a truly terrifying opponent. Each move plays a crucial role in its combat flow, allowing for intricate combos and unexpected maneuvers. Mastering the timing and application of these skills is essential for any aspiring King Crimson user.

**Video Highlights:**
- Demonstrates **Boxing Vampire King Crimson** build in action.
- Showcases powerful combo extenders like **Dempsey Roll** and **Impale**.
- Highlights **Time Erase** as a broken ability for invulnerability.
- Provides examples of Eye Gouge's heavy damage and hyper armor.
- Features PvP gameplay demonstrating the build's effectiveness.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="PchKKITo-tg" title="this king crimson build has INSANE combos... | Bizzare Lineage" />

The synergy between King Crimson's base moves and chosen fighting styles unlocks its true power. From its rapid-fire Barrage to the deceptive Time Erase, each ability contributes to a highly aggressive and difficult-to-predict playstyle.

| Move Name     | Key | Type      | Description                                                                                             |
| :------------ | :-- | :-------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Heavy Punch** | E   | Melee     | A powerful, high-damage strike, often referred to as "Chop." Has **hyper armor** and can cause bleed. |
| **Epitaph**   | R   | Counter   | A versatile counter-attack. Activates a short invulnerability window, punishing aggressive foes.        |
| **Time Erase**  | Z   | Special   | Grants temporary **invisibility and invulnerability**. Resets HP to activation point, breaks combos.    |
| **Impale**    | V   | Melee     | A high-damage execution move. Can be reactivated for a second hit or grab, extending combos.            |
| **Eye Gouge**   | C   | Special   | A powerful attack that can blind opponents on hit, dealing significant damage and providing utility.    |

<Callout type="warning" title="Mastering Wind-ups">
Many of King Crimson's most powerful moves, such as Chop, Impale, and Eye Gouge, have noticeable wind-up animations. Practice anticipating opponent movements and using your hyper armor frames to land these critical hits effectively.
</Callout>

Time Erase, in particular, is a game-changing ability. It allows for temporary invulnerability and can reset your health to the state it was in when the ability was activated, essentially negating burst damage. This makes it a potent tool for escaping dangerous situations or turning the tide of a losing fight.

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Crafting the Ultimate King Crimson Build">
To truly unleash King Crimson's potential, pairing it with the right fighting style is paramount. The community widely regards the combination of **Boxing** and **Vampire** as the most effective for a King Crimson build, offering an unparalleled blend of offense, defense, and sustain. This setup maximizes combo potential and provides crucial advantages in prolonged engagements.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="Boxing Synergy">
    - **Dempsey Roll**: Offers a second counter, enabling more defensive options and combo extensions.
    - **White Fang**: Provides knockback, setting up further attacks or creating distance.
    - **Liver Crusher**: Excellent for extending existing combos and maintaining pressure.
    - **Overall**: High damage, multiple counters, and strong combo game.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Vampire Synergy">
    - **Life Drain**: Provides crucial health regeneration, increasing survivability.
    - **Blood Suck**: Further enhances sustain, allowing for aggressive trades.
    - **Frostbite**: Adds crowd control and extra damage, complementing King Crimson's melee focus.
    - **Overall**: Enhanced sustain, utility, and additional damage sources.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="success" title="The Boxing Vampire Advantage">
The Boxing Vampire combination for King Crimson is considered top-tier due to its synergy. Boxing provides multiple counters and combo extenders, while Vampire offers sustain and additional damage, creating a build that is both aggressive and resilient.
</Callout>

Skill point allocation is another critical aspect of optimizing your **King Crimson** build. While destructive power is often a priority for damage, investing in Conjuration is necessary for your Stand to fully manifest and unlock its ultimate potential. Balancing these attributes based on your playstyle and current progression is key.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Early Game Focus: Destructive Power">
    Prioritize **Destructive Power** early on to maximize your damage output for faster grinding and quest completion. This will help you level up more quickly and clear content efficiently.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Mid Game: Conjuration & HP Balance">
    Once your damage is sufficient, start investing points into **Conjuration** to improve your Stand's manifestation and unlock higher-tier abilities. Allocate some points to **HP** for increased survivability.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Late Game: Maximize Core Stats">
    Aim to fully max out **Vampire** and **Boxing** skill trees. Continue to invest in **Destructive Power** and **Conjuration** until both are at optimal levels, ensuring your King Crimson is a true force.
  </Step>
</Steps>

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Dominating PvP with King Crimson Combos & Strategies">
King Crimson truly shines in PvP, where its unique abilities allow for unpredictable and overwhelming assaults. Mastering its combos and understanding matchup dynamics are crucial for securing victories against other players. The Boxing Vampire build provides an insane array of options for both offense and defense.

| Combo Sequence                               | Effect                                                                                                                                           | Key Benefits                                     |
| :------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | :----------------------------------------------- |
| **M1 x3 > White Fang > Right Click > M1 x3** | Basic opener, knocks back for follow-up attacks.                                                                                                 | Easy to execute, sets up further damage.         |
| **M1 x3 > Liver Crusher > Impale > Eye Gouge** | High-damage combo, uses Impale as an extender and Eye Gouge for a powerful finisher/blind.                                                       | Sustained damage, utility, strong finisher.      |
| **Dempsey Roll (Counter) > M1 x3 > Chop**    | Punishes aggressive opponents, follows with a quick melee sequence and a heavy hit.                                                                | High counter-damage, punishes mistakes.          |
| **Time Erase (Defensive) > Full Barrage**    | Used to escape burst damage or reset health, then immediately pressure with a full barrage while invulnerable.                                     | Escape, health reset, counter-pressure.          |

<Callout type="info" title="Matchup Awareness">
King Crimson excels against Stands like **Crazy Diamond** and **Whitesnake** due to its disruptive abilities and high damage output. However, it can struggle against Stands with high mobility or long-range pressure, such as **Made in Heaven**. Always consider your opponent's Stand and adjust your strategy accordingly.
</Callout>

Success in PvP with King Crimson also relies on consistent practice and adaptability. Knowing when to engage, when to counter, and when to disengage with Time Erase will elevate your gameplay significantly.

<Checklist
  id="pvp-readiness"
  title="King Crimson PvP Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Practice combo execution in training mode.",
    "Learn the optimal timings for Epitaph and Time Erase.",
    "Study common opponent Stands and their weaknesses.",
    "Master movement and dodging to avoid enemy attacks.",
    "Keep your Stand and fighting style skills fully leveled."
  ]}
/>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get King Crimson in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "King Crimson is primarily obtained by using a Stand Arrow. Due to its S-Tier rarity, it may require multiple attempts. Focus on farming Stand Arrows from world events and quests."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best fighting style to pair with King Crimson?",
    answer: "The recommended fighting styles for King Crimson are Boxing and Vampire. This combination provides excellent combo potential, multiple counters, and crucial health sustain, making it highly effective in PvP and PvE."
  },
  {
    question: "How does King Crimson's Time Erase ability work?",
    answer: "Time Erase grants temporary invisibility and invulnerability. Crucially, it also resets your HP to the amount you had when the ability was activated, making it a powerful tool for escaping damage or turning a fight around."
  },
  {
    question: "What are some common mistakes to avoid when using King Crimson?",
    answer: "Avoid using King Crimson without a complementary fighting style like Boxing or Vampire. Ignoring matchup charts and rushing Awakening before meeting the 110-point requirement are also common pitfalls that hinder optimal performance."
  }
]} />

</Section>
